response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience on Windows and has no visible exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — the core requirements for this role. While they have broad full-stack experience, their C++ work is limited to academic/legacy projects over a decade ago, and their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems across domains
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows platform
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
